prompt: How can I optimize this slow query? SELECT * FROM orders WHERE YEAR(order_date) = 2023

Make this SQL more readable: SELECT o.id, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as total FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'shipped' GROUP BY o.id, c.name HAVING total > 100
What's wrong with my table design? I have a users table with columns: id, name, email, phone, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, zip_code, country
